hint_configuration.description: WazuhBOTS CTF hint cost configuration. Defines hint pricing by difficulty level with a progressive hint system allowing up to 3 hints per challenge.

progressive_system.description: Hints are unlocked sequentially. Hint 2 cannot be purchased until Hint 1 is revealed. Each subsequent hint is more specific and costly.

hint_1.description: General guidance - points to the right Wazuh Dashboard area, filter, or field to investigate

hint_2.description: Specific direction - provides the exact filter query, field name, or time range to use

hint_3.description: Near answer - narrows the answer to a very small range or gives the format/pattern

pup.hint_philosophy: Pup hints teach dashboard navigation skills. They progressively guide analysts to the correct location, filter, and field in the Wazuh Dashboard.

hint_1.description: Investigation direction - identifies the log source, rule group, or event type to focus on

hint_2.description: Correlation guidance - provides specific field names, event IDs, or correlation logic

hint_3.description: Answer framing - gives the answer format, tool name category, or specific event details

hunter.hint_philosophy: Hunter hints develop event correlation skills. They guide analysts through the process of connecting multiple data sources and identifying attack patterns.

hint_1.description: Methodology hint - suggests the analytical approach, framework reference, or detection strategy

hint_2.description: Technical detail - provides specific MITRE IDs, rule syntax elements, or forensic artifact locations

hint_3.description: Deep guidance - offers the specific configuration, command syntax, or artifact value with context

alpha.hint_philosophy: Alpha hints develop threat hunting and forensic analysis skills. They guide analysts through advanced techniques including rule creation, MITRE mapping, and evidence correlation.

hint_1.description: Strategic hint - identifies the class of technique, evasion category, or investigation methodology required

hint_2.description: Tactical hint - provides specific technical details about the evasion mechanism, correlation approach, or reconstruction method

hint_3.description: Operational hint - gives detailed specifics including exact values, paths, or formatted components of the answer

fenrir.hint_philosophy: Fenrir hints are expensive but comprehensive. They are designed for expert-level challenges involving multi-vector analysis, evasion detection, and complete incident reconstruction.

training_mode.description: All hints are free in training mode. Used for SOC onboarding and guided exercises.

competition_mode.description: Standard hint costs apply. Used for CTF events and meetups.

guided_mode.description: Hints cost 50% of normal price. Used for self-guided learning.

hardcore_mode.description: Hints cost 150% of normal price. Used for advanced competitions.

ctfd_import_settings.prerequisite_behavior: Hints must be unlocked in order (hint_1 before hint_2, hint_2 before hint_3)
